title: racosperma improcerum
side_effects: Racosperma improcerum can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap or ingestion of its leaves can cause nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In severe cases, improper use of the racosperma improcerum plant can lead to liver damage, kidney failure, and even cardiovascular issues. It is essential to consult a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using this plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
